programmes.show_name: We Still Kill The Old Way
programmes.show_description: Gritty British crime drama with Ian Ogilvy. A retired gangster returns to London and gets his old crew back together to avenge the death of his brother and restore order to the streets. (2014)
Sci-fi thriller with Sylvester Stallone. In a dystopian regime where a cross-country race requires contestants to brutally run down innocent pedestrians, a rebel leader plans to sabotage it. (1975)

Hooker persuades a blind witness to testify against murderous thieves, knowing that she's putting herself in great danger. S2, Ep4
An alien woman arranges to meet Vincent to discuss the possibility of defecting and supplying information, however, fellow Invaders are in pursuit determined to silence her.
Action starring Ming-Na Wen (Marvel: Agents of SHIELD). A meteorologist and a petroleum engineer team up to track down a tornado threatening western America. (2012)

Action adventure directed by James Yukich. Two brothers must stop an evil gang leader from completing an ancient Chinese medallion, which will grant ultimate power. (1994)

Disaster flick with James Brolin. With global warming in overdrive and most of the Earth flooded, a father and son are sent on a special mission to find a relic that could save the world. (2008)

Thriller sequel with Michael Caine. A retired British spy is called back into service to help prevent North Korea from getting its hands on a deadly virus called 'The Red Death'.
Vietnam War adventure with Danny Glover. A bomber pilot disillusioned by military hierarchy finds an ally in a veteran bombardier, and they launch an attack on an anti-aircraft missile site. (1990)
Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative must join forces with another prisoner to break free. (2018)
Thriller with Richard Dreyfuss. Desperate to find his missing daughter, a former Black Ops soldier goes on a merciless quest for revenge to bring those responsible to justice. (2021)

Apocalyptic sci-fi adventure. With a new planet hurtling towards a doomed Earth, a group of scientists build a rocket to take them to safety on a new world. (1951)
Classic sci-fi with Gene Barry. When a deadly alien threat reaches Earth, scientist Clayton Forrester and Sylvia Van Buren are all that stand in the way of total annihilation! (1953)

Crime thriller with Christian Bale. A steelworker takes matters into his own hands when his younger brother returns from service in Iraq and disappears after getting involved with gangsters. (2013)
